original:
parseDotenv("FOO=bar
# comment

export BAZ=qux
QUOTED="hello world"") returns { FOO: "bar", BAZ: "qux", QUOTED: "hello world" }
refined:
parseDotenv("FOO=bar
# comment

export BAZ=qux
QUOTED="hello world"") returns { FOO: "bar", BAZ: "qux", QUOTED: "hello world" }

original: parseDotenv("") returns an empty object
refined: parseDotenv("") returns an empty object

original: parseDotenv("export KEY=value") returns { KEY: "value" } (export prefix stripped)
refined: parseDotenv("export KEY=value") returns { KEY: "value" } (export prefix stripped)

original: resolveEnvVars({ a: "$FOO", b: { c: "$BAR" } }, { FOO: "x", BAR: "y" }) returns { a: "x", b: { c: "y" } }
refined: resolveEnvVars({ a: "$FOO", b: { c: "$BAR" } }, { FOO: "x", BAR: "y" }) returns { a: "x", b: { c: "y" } }

original: resolveEnvVars({ a: "$MISSING" }, {}) throws an error whose message contains "MISSING" and the string "$MISSING"
refined: resolveEnvVars({ a: "$MISSING" }, {}) throws an error whose message contains "MISSING" and the string "$MISSING"

original: resolveEnvVars({ n: 5, arr: [1, 2] }, {}) returns the input unchanged (non-string values pass through)
refined: resolveEnvVars({ n: 5, arr: [1, 2] }, {}) returns the input unchanged (non-string values pass through)

original: resolveEnvVars({ a: "$$LITERAL" }, {}) returns { a: "$LITERAL" } (double-dollar escape)
refined: resolveEnvVars({ a: "$$LITERAL" }, {}) returns { a: "$LITERAL" } (double-dollar escape)

original: resolveEnvVars({ a: "prefix-$FOO-suffix" }, { FOO: "mid" }) returns { a: "prefix-mid-suffix" } (inline substitution)
refined: resolveEnvVars({ a: "prefix-$FOO-suffix" }, { FOO: "mid" }) returns { a: "prefix-mid-suffix" } (inline substitution)

original: loadProfile("fast", projectDir) returns deep-merged contents of global and project fast.json when both exist, with project values taking precedence
refined: loadProfile("fast", projectDir) returns deep-merged contents of global and project fast.json when both exist, with project values taking precedence

original: loadProfile("fast", projectDir) returns only global profile contents when no project-level fast.json exists
refined: loadProfile("fast", projectDir) returns only global profile contents when no project-level fast.json exists

original: loadProfile("nonexistent", projectDir) throws an error whose message contains "nonexistent"
refined: loadProfile("nonexistent", projectDir) throws an error whose message contains "nonexistent"

original: loadProfileEnv("fast", projectDir) returns merged env map from global and project .env files, with project values taking precedence over global, and both taking precedence over process.env entries
refined: loadProfileEnv("fast", projectDir) returns merged env map from global and project .env files, with project values taking precedence over global, and both taking precedence over process.env entries

original: resolveProfileName({ profile: "cli" }, { NAX_PROFILE: "env" }) returns "cli" (CLI takes priority over env var)
refined: resolveProfileName({ profile: "cli" }, { NAX_PROFILE: "env" }) returns "cli" (CLI takes priority over env var)

original: resolveProfileName({}, { NAX_PROFILE: "env" }) returns "env" (env var used when no CLI override)
refined: resolveProfileName({}, { NAX_PROFILE: "env" }) returns "env" (env var used when no CLI override)

original: resolveProfileName({}, {}) with "profile": "persisted" in project config.json returns "persisted" (config.json fallback)
refined: resolveProfileName({}, {}) with "profile": "persisted" in project config.json returns "persisted" (config.json fallback)

original: resolveProfileName({}, {}) with no profile set anywhere returns "default"
refined: resolveProfileName({}, {}) with no profile set anywhere returns "default"

original: listProfiles(startDir) returns profile names and paths from both global and project scopes
refined: listProfiles(startDir) returns profile names and paths from both global and project scopes

original: NaxConfigSchema.parse({}).profile equals "default" (schema default)
refined: NaxConfigSchema.parse({}).profile equals "default" (schema default)

original: NaxConfigSchema.parse({ profile: "fast" }).profile equals "fast"
refined: NaxConfigSchema.parse({ profile: "fast" }).profile equals "fast"

original: NaxConfigSchema.parse({}).profile equals "default"
refined: NaxConfigSchema.parse({}).profile equals "default"

original: NaxConfigSchema.parse({ profile: "fast" }).profile equals "fast"
refined: NaxConfigSchema.parse({ profile: "fast" }).profile equals "fast"

original: loadProfile("fast", projectDir) returns deep-merged contents of global and project fast.json when both exist, with project values taking precedence
refined: loadProfile("fast", projectDir) returns deep-merged contents of global and project fast.json when both exist, with project values taking precedence

original: loadProfile("fast", projectDir) returns only global profile contents when no project-level fast.json exists
refined: loadProfile("fast", projectDir) returns only global profile contents when no project-level fast.json exists

original: loadProfile("nonexistent", projectDir) throws an error whose message contains "nonexistent"
refined: loadProfile("nonexistent", projectDir) throws an error whose message contains "nonexistent"

original: loadProfileEnv("fast", projectDir) returns merged env map from global and project .env files, with project values taking precedence over global, and both taking precedence over process.env entries
refined: loadProfileEnv("fast", projectDir) returns merged env map from global and project .env files, with project values taking precedence over global, and both taking precedence over process.env entries

original: resolveProfileName({ profile: "cli" }, { NAX_PROFILE: "env" }) returns "cli" (CLI takes priority over env var)
refined: resolveProfileName({ profile: "cli" }, { NAX_PROFILE: "env" }) returns "cli" (CLI takes priority over env var)

original: resolveProfileName({}, { NAX_PROFILE: "env" }) returns "env" (env var used when no CLI override)
refined: resolveProfileName({}, { NAX_PROFILE: "env" }) returns "env" (env var used when no CLI override)

original: resolveProfileName({}, {}) with "profile": "persisted" in project config.json returns "persisted" (config.json fallback)
refined: resolveProfileName({}, {}) with "profile": "persisted" in project config.json returns "persisted" (config.json fallback)

original: resolveProfileName({}, {}) with no profile set anywhere returns "default"
refined: resolveProfileName({}, {}) with no profile set anywhere returns "default"

original: listProfiles(startDir) returns profile names and paths from both global and project scopes
refined: listProfiles(startDir) returns profile names and paths from both global and project scopes

original: loadConfig(dir, { profile: "fast" }) merges the fast profile between defaults and global config.json layers
refined: loadConfig(dir, { profile: "fast" }) merges the fast profile between defaults and global config.json layers

original: loadConfig(dir) with NAX_PROFILE=fast in process.env applies the fast profile when no CLI profile override is present
refined: loadConfig(dir) with NAX_PROFILE=fast in process.env applies the fast profile when no CLI profile override is present

original: loadConfig(dir) with "profile": "fast" in project config.json applies the fast profile when neither CLI nor env override is set
refined: loadConfig(dir) with "profile": "fast" in project config.json applies the fast profile when neither CLI nor env override is set

original: loadConfig(dir, { profile: "fast" }) returns config with profile="fast" even when NAX_PROFILE="thorough" is set (CLI priority)
refined: loadConfig(dir, { profile: "fast" }) returns config with profile="fast" even when NAX_PROFILE="thorough" is set (CLI priority)

original: loadConfig(dir) with no profile set anywhere returns config identical to today's behavior (backward compatible) with profile="default"
refined: loadConfig(dir) with no profile set anywhere returns config identical to today's behavior (backward compatible) with profile="default"

original: When NAX_PROFILE=fast and project config.json has "profile": "slow", loadConfig() returns config.profile === "fast" (force-set prevents overwrite)
refined: When NAX_PROFILE=fast and project config.json has "profile": "slow", loadConfig() returns config.profile === "fast" (force-set prevents overwrite)

original: The "profile" field from global config.json is stripped before merging into the config object (profile JSON value does not leak into merged result)
refined: The "profile" field from global config.json is stripped before merging into the config object (profile JSON value does not leak into merged result)

original: The "profile" field from project config.json is stripped before merging into the config object
refined: The "profile" field from project config.json is stripped before merging into the config object

original: Companion .env file values used for $VAR resolution do not modify process.env after loadConfig() returns
refined: Companion .env file values used for $VAR resolution do not modify process.env after loadConfig() returns

original: loadConfig(dir, { profile: "default" }) applies no profile overlay — result matches defaults + global + project config layers only
refined: loadConfig(dir, { profile: "default" }) applies no profile overlay — result matches defaults + global + project config layers only

original: profileListCommand(startDir) outputs profile names grouped by scope label ("global" / "project") with the active profile marked with "*"
refined: profileListCommand(startDir) outputs profile names grouped by scope label ("global" / "project") with the active profile marked with "*"

original: profileShowCommand("fast", startDir, { unmask: false }) outputs profile JSON where values originating from $VAR substitution are masked as "***"
refined: profileShowCommand("fast", startDir, { unmask: false }) outputs profile JSON where values originating from $VAR substitution are masked as "***"

original: profileShowCommand("fast", startDir, { unmask: false }) masks keys matching /key|token|secret|password|credential/i regardless of source
refined: profileShowCommand("fast", startDir, { unmask: false }) masks keys matching /key|token|secret|password|credential/i regardless of source

original: profileShowCommand("fast", startDir, { unmask: true }) outputs raw values and includes a warning banner containing "WARNING"
refined: profileShowCommand("fast", startDir, { unmask: true }) outputs raw values and includes a warning banner containing "WARNING"

original: profileUseCommand("fast", startDir) writes "profile": "fast" into .nax/config.json and returns a confirmation message
refined: profileUseCommand("fast", startDir) writes "profile": "fast" into .nax/config.json and returns a confirmation message

original: profileUseCommand("default", startDir) removes the "profile" field from .nax/config.json entirely
refined: profileUseCommand("default", startDir) removes the "profile" field from .nax/config.json entirely

original: profileCurrentCommand(startDir) returns the resolved profile name following the priority chain (CLI > NAX_PROFILE > config.json > "default")
refined: profileCurrentCommand(startDir) returns the resolved profile name following the priority chain (CLI > NAX_PROFILE > config.json > "default")

original: profileCreateCommand("myprofile", startDir) creates .nax/profiles/myprofile.json containing {} and returns the created file path
refined: profileCreateCommand("myprofile", startDir) creates .nax/profiles/myprofile.json containing {} and returns the created file path

original: profileCreateCommand("myprofile", startDir) when .nax/profiles/myprofile.json already exists throws an error with exit code 1
refined: profileCreateCommand("myprofile", startDir) when .nax/profiles/myprofile.json already exists throws an error with exit code 1

original: The profile subcommands are registered under "nax config profile" in bin/nax.ts and appear in help output
refined: The profile subcommands are registered under "nax config profile" in bin/nax.ts and appear in help output

original: The run command in bin/nax.ts accepts a --profile <name> option and passes it to loadConfig as a CLI override
refined: The run command in bin/nax.ts accepts a --profile <name> option and passes it to loadConfig as a CLI override

original: The plan command in bin/nax.ts accepts a --profile <name> option and passes it to loadConfig as a CLI override
refined: The plan command in bin/nax.ts accepts a --profile <name> option and passes it to loadConfig as a CLI override

original: nax run --profile fast -f my-feature loads config with the fast profile applied without modifying .nax/config.json
refined: nax run --profile fast -f my-feature loads config with the fast profile applied without modifying .nax/config.json

original: nax run -f my-feature without --profile and without NAX_PROFILE uses the config.json profile field, defaulting to "default"
refined: nax run -f my-feature without --profile and without NAX_PROFILE uses the config.json profile field, defaulting to "default"

original: The --profile option appears in nax run --help output
refined: The --profile option appears in nax run --help output

original: The --profile option appears in nax plan --help output
refined: The --profile option appears in nax plan --help output
